queries.question:
List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where intended use is not one of ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgA Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgA antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgG Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgG antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgM Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgM antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgA/IgG/IgM ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative detection of Rheumatoid Factor 
IgA, IgG and IgM antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of rheumatoid 
arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings., See indications for use below., See Indications for Use below., SimplexaVZV Direct: The DiaSorin Molecular Simplexa VZV Direct assay is intended
for use on the LIAISON MDX instrument for the qualitative detection of varicella-zoster 
virus (VZV) DNA in cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) from patients with signs and/or symptoms 
of meningitis and/or encephalitis. This test is intended as an aid in the diagnosis of VZV 
infections of the central nervous system (CNS).  
 
Negative results do not preclude VZV infection and should not be used as the sole basis 
for treatment or other patient management decisions. 
 
The assay is not intended for use as a donor screening test. The assay is for professional 
use only.  
 
Simplexa VZV Positive Control Pack. The Simplexa VZV Positive Control Pack is 
intended to be used as a control with the Simplexa VZV Direct kit. This control is not 
intended for use with other assays or systems., and 3 more.
queries.sql:
SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "intended_use" NOT IN ('ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgA Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgA antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgG Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgG antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgM Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgM antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgA/IgG/IgM ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative detection of Rheumatoid Factor 
IgA, IgG and IgM antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of rheumatoid 
arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings.', 'See indications for use below.', 'See Indications for Use below.', 'SimplexaVZV Direct: The DiaSorin Molecular Simplexa VZV Direct assay is intended
for use on the LIAISON MDX instrument for the qualitative detection of varicella-zoster 
virus (VZV) DNA in cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) from patients with signs and/or symptoms 
of meningitis and/or encephalitis. This test is intended as an aid in the diagnosis of VZV 
infections of the central nervous system (CNS).  
 
Negative results do not preclude VZV infection and should not be used as the sole basis 
for treatment or other patient management decisions. 
 
The assay is not intended for use as a donor screening test. The assay is for professional 
use only.  
 
Simplexa VZV Positive Control Pack. The Simplexa VZV Positive Control Pack is 
intended to be used as a control with the Simplexa VZV Direct kit. This control is not 
intended for use with other assays or systems.', 'For the quantitative determination of free protein S antigen in human plasma collected from venous blood samples in 3.2% sodium citrate tubes on the Sysmex CS- 5100 analyzer. As an aid in the diagnosis of protein S deficiency in patients who are suspected of free protein S deficiency. The performance of this device has not been established in neonate and pediatric patient populations.', 'See indication(s) for use below.', 'ETEST is a quantitative technique for determination of antimicrobial susceptibility of 
non-fastidious Gram-negative and Gram-positive aerobic bacteria such as 
Enterobacteriaceae, Pseudomonas, Staphylococcus, and Enterococcus species and 
fastidious bacteria, such as anaerobes, N. gonorrhoeae, S. pneumoniae, Streptococcus and 
Haemophilus species. The system comprises a predefined antibiotic gradient which is 
used to determine the Minimum Inhibitory Concentration (MIC), in µg/mL, of different 
antimicrobial agents against microorganisms as tested on agar media using overnight 
incubation. 
Telavancin has been shown to be active against the Gram positive aerobic 
microorganisms listed below according to the FDA label for this antimicrobial agent. 
Active both in vitro and in clinical infections: 
Staphylococcus aureus (including methicillin-resistant isolates) 
Enterococcus faecalis (vancomycin-susceptible isolates only)');

value:
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgA Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgA antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgG Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgG antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgM Antibody ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative or semi-quantitative detection 
of Rheumatoid Factor IgM antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of 
rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings. 
ImmuLisa Enhanced™ RF IgA/IgG/IgM ELISA: 
Enzyme linked immunoassay (ELISA) for the qualitative detection of Rheumatoid Factor 
IgA, IgG and IgM antibodies in human serum to aid in the diagnosis of rheumatoid 
arthritis (RA) in conjunction with other laboratory tests and clinical findings.

SimplexaVZV Direct: The DiaSorin Molecular Simplexa VZV Direct assay is intended
for use on the LIAISON MDX instrument for the qualitative detection of varicella-zoster 
virus (VZV) DNA in cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) from patients with signs and/or symptoms 
of meningitis and/or encephalitis. This test is intended as an aid in the diagnosis of VZV 
infections of the central nervous system (CNS).  
 
Negative results do not preclude VZV infection and should not be used as the sole basis 
for treatment or other patient management decisions. 
 
The assay is not intended for use as a donor screening test. The assay is for professional 
use only.  
 
Simplexa VZV Positive Control Pack. The Simplexa VZV Positive Control Pack is 
intended to be used as a control with the Simplexa VZV Direct kit. This control is not 
intended for use with other assays or systems.

For the quantitative determination of free protein S antigen in human plasma collected from venous blood samples in 3.2% sodium citrate tubes on the Sysmex CS- 5100 analyzer. As an aid in the diagnosis of protein S deficiency in patients who are suspected of free protein S deficiency. The performance of this device has not been established in neonate and pediatric patient populations.

ETEST is a quantitative technique for determination of antimicrobial susceptibility of 
non-fastidious Gram-negative and Gram-positive aerobic bacteria such as 
Enterobacteriaceae, Pseudomonas, Staphylococcus, and Enterococcus species and 
fastidious bacteria, such as anaerobes, N. gonorrhoeae, S. pneumoniae, Streptococcus and 
Haemophilus species. The system comprises a predefined antibiotic gradient which is 
used to determine the Minimum Inhibitory Concentration (MIC), in µg/mL, of different 
antimicrobial agents against microorganisms as tested on agar media using overnight 
incubation. 
Telavancin has been shown to be active against the Gram positive aerobic 
microorganisms listed below according to the FDA label for this antimicrobial agent. 
Active both in vitro and in clinical infections: 
Staphylococcus aureus (including methicillin-resistant isolates) 
Enterococcus faecalis (vancomycin-susceptible isolates only)

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where regulation section is not one of 21 CFR §866.5775: Rheumatoid factor immunological test system, 866.1640 Antimicrobial Susceptibility Test Powder, 21 CFR 864.5220, Automated differential cell counter.
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "regulation_section" NOT IN ('21 CFR §866.5775: Rheumatoid factor immunological test system', '866.1640 Antimicrobial Susceptibility Test Powder', '21 CFR 864.5220, Automated differential cell counter');

value: 21 CFR §866.5775: Rheumatoid factor immunological test system

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where measurand is not one of Rheumatoid Factors (RF) IgA, IgG, IgM, and Rheumatoid Factor Total, Varizella zoster virus DNA, Free Protein S Antigen (%).
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "measurand" NOT IN ('Rheumatoid Factors (RF) IgA, IgG, IgM, and Rheumatoid Factor Total', 'Varizella zoster virus DNA', 'Free Protein S Antigen (%)');

value: Rheumatoid Factors (RF) IgA, IgG, IgM, and Rheumatoid Factor Total

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where proposed labeling does not equal The labeling is sufficient and it satisfies the requirements of 21 CFR Parts 801 and 809 and the special controls for this device type..
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "proposed_labeling" <> 'The labeling is sufficient and it satisfies the requirements of 21 CFR Parts 801 and 809 and the special controls for this device type.';

meta.value: The labeling is sufficient and it satisfies the requirements of 21 CFR Parts 801 and 809 and the special controls for this device type.

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where regulation section does not equal 21 CFR 866.3830; Treponema pallidum treponemal test reagents..
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "regulation_section" <> '21 CFR 866.3830; Treponema pallidum treponemal test reagents.';

meta.value: 21 CFR 866.3830; Treponema pallidum treponemal test reagents.

queries.question: List predicate device name from fda_510k_device_submission where proprietary and established names does not equal Cepheid Xpert CT/NG Control Panel.
queries.sql: SELECT "predicate_device_name" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "proprietary_and_established_names" <> 'Cepheid Xpert CT/NG Control Panel';

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where 510k number does not equal K161217.
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "510k_number" <> 'K161217';

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where applicant does not equal ThermoFisher Scientific.
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "applicant" <> 'ThermoFisher Scientific';

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where panel is not one of Hematology (81), Microbiology (83), Immunology (82), Clinical Chemistry (75), and 11 more.
